settings.title: Availability Settings
settings.description: Control when travelers can request your guide time.
settings.workingDaysDescription: Choose the days travelers can request you.
settings.workingHoursDescription: Set the time windows you can host experiences.
settings.bookingRulesDescription: Decide how much notice and breathing room you need.
settings.bufferTimeDescription: Time between bookings so you can reset and travel.
settings.maximumAdvanceBookingDescription: How far ahead travelers can request you.
settings.minimumAdvanceBookingDescription: Minimum notice before a traveler can request you.
settings.instantBookingDescription: Let travelers book without waiting for manual approval.
settings.notificationsDescription: Choose which notifications you want to receive
settings.newBookingDescription: Get notified when a traveler requests you.
settings.cancellationDescription: Get notified when bookings are cancelled
settings.reschedulingDescription: Get notified when bookings are rescheduled
settings.timeZoneDescription: Your local time zone for scheduling
settings.resetSettingsDescription: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to default values?
